name: Theo Prinz von Hirschreich And Hermann Von Furst Eden
description:
"Look, Prince Theo. This weaklings are no match for us!" "Hmph. Guess we'll show them how Harschreich does things here."


Theo and Hermann from Knights college! I made this overnight yet again.

As usual, they have basic information about the students (excluding gamir and felix, I'll work it out later..)

My first time experimenting with multiple characters in a bot btw dont judge pls
